validator.gte: %s must be greater than or equal to %s
validator.lte: %s must be less than or equal to %s
validator.ip: %s must be a valid IP address
validator.ipv4: %s must be a valid IPv4 address
validator.ipv6: %s must be a valid IPv6 address
validator.fqdn: %s must be a fully qualified domain name
validator.cidr: %s must be a valid CIDR notation
validator.credit_card: %s must be a valid credit card number
validator.regex_name: %s must be a valid name format
validator.strong_password: %s must contain at least 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, and special char
